page_content:
Formerly: GEOG398E.

GEOG384 Internship in Geography | (3 Credits)

Supervised field training to provide career experience. Introduction to professional level activities, demands, opportunities. Placement at a public agency, non-profit organization, or private firm. Participation requires application to the internship advisor in preceding semester. Prerequisite: GEOG211, GEOG306, GEOG212, and GEOG201; and (ENGL393 or ENGL390).

Restriction: Must be in Geography program.
